summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CultGig 3D landing page. Backend APIs working correctly with minor email validation issue. Frontend fully functional with all components rendering and interactive features working. Hero section properly center-aligned, waitlist form with all 4 fields functional, role toggles highlighting correctly, and successful API integration.

validation_issues.issue: Backend accepts invalid email formats without validation
validation_issues.impact: Should return 400 validation error but returns 201 with invalid email like 'invalid-email'

integration_issues.issue: Duplicate email error message not displaying in frontend
integration_issues.impact: Backend correctly returns 409 for duplicate emails but frontend doesn't show the amber warning message

passed_tests: Missing fields validation returns 400 error from backend
Duplicate email detection returns 409 error from backend
Hero section center-aligned: pill label, headline, sub-headline, CTA buttons, trust line, scroll arrow
Waitlist form has all 4 fields: name, email, WhatsApp number, role toggle
WhatsApp field shows helper text 'Include country code e.g. +91 for India'
Role toggle buttons highlight with #EAFF00 border when selected
Form submission sends POST to /api/waitlist with all required fields
Success response (201) shows green success message and clears form
Mobile navigation works (5 navigation links visible)
All other sections render (Features, How It Works, App Download, Footer)
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Add email format validation to backend /api/waitlist endpoint to reject invalid email formats with 400 status. 2) Fix frontend duplicate email error message display - ensure [data-testid='waitlist-duplicate-message'] selector shows amber warning when backend returns 409 status.
success_percentage: Backend: 88.9% (8/9 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (11/12 features working correctly)
